Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Intelligence collection (OSINT / SOCMINT / SIGINT / HUMINT / GEOINT / FININT / MASINT / OSINT-AI) > OSINT — open-source intelligence > Image / video reverse-search > Search-engine dorking (Google / Bing / Yandex / DuckDuckGo)

Prepare.path: Prepare > Microtarget > Cyber operation configuration lattice > Identity-access pressure > Privilege scope class > Developer console access pressure within microtargeting

Execute.path: Execute > Conduct Pump Priming > AI-agentic architecture lattice > Planner controller pressure > Verifier supervisor class > Confidence display distortion within pump priming
Execute.technique: Confidence display distortion within pump priming
